_label_tier_note: HK Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: HK Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: is not generally known to persons who are accustomed to or would be likely to deal in our shares
blackout period from 13 May to 12 June
the insider list has been updated
no selective briefing has been conducted
circulate only to the Board and designated insiders until an announcement is published on the Exchange

If forensic analysis confirms exfiltration of the Banyan pricing model or the co‑investment term sheet, the Board will consider an announcement before market open on 5 June 2026, or a trading halt if appropriate, to avoid any false market
a proposed acquisition of Silver Juniper Logistics Ltd
no copies of government ID scans are stored on that vendor instance
do not include counterparties or analysts

Separately, a log shows a short‑lived login to the virtual data room for Project “Banyan” (a proposed acquisition of Silver Juniper Logistics Ltd. with a contemplated co‑investment by Azure Banyan Fund I LP), which has not been announced; this may constitute inside information under Part XIVA of the SFO and is not generally known to persons who are accustomed to or would be likely to deal in our shares.

We have engaged Cedar & Cloud Chambers and Typhoon Ridge Security Ltd. for forensic review; evidence collection is ongoing, and the relevant privacy regulator has been notified of a potential data breach.

For the avoidance of doubt, this notice does not constitute a profit warning, does not trigger any material adverse change under our facility agreements, and does not amend any employment terms or remuneration policies.
